title: Fix BUG-002: Prerequisites screen concurrent installs and poor UI
notes: Implementation plan for fixing concurrent install failures and UI quality issues on prerequisites screen. Adopts patterns from 202602-workstation TUI.

title: Add failed state to _TS dataclass and refactor status model
description: Replace boolean `installing` field with a proper status string (pending/queued/installing/done/failed). Add `failed` field or use an enum. This is the foundation all other tasks build on.
closed_reason: Implemented ToolStatus enum with PENDING/INSTALLED/QUEUED/INSTALLING/DONE/FAILED states. _TS dataclass now uses status: ToolStatus instead of installed: bool + installing: bool.

title: Replace widget teardown with in-place updates
description: Eliminate _rebuild_rows(). Pre-compose all tool rows in compose() with stable widget IDs. Create _update_tool_status(binary, status) that calls .update() on existing Labels/Statics and toggles Button .disabled. No remove_children() anywhere.
closed_reason: All tool rows pre-composed in compose() with stable IDs (icon-{binary}, state-{binary}, hint-{binary}, row-{binary}). _update_tool_ui() updates widgets in-place via .update(). _rebuild_rows() eliminated entirely.

title: Implement sequential install queue
description: Replace @work(exclusive=False) + concurrent _run_install with a single @work(thread=True) method that iterates the install queue sequentially. Use subprocess.Popen in the thread (not asyncio) with call_from_thread for TUI updates.
closed_reason: Single @work(thread=True, exclusive=True) _run_install_queue() iterates tools sequentially. Uses subprocess.Popen with call_from_thread for TUI updates. No more asyncio subprocess. No more concurrent dpkg lock contention.

title: Add per-tool progress indication
description: Show inline status per tool row: spinner for installing, checkmark for done, X for failed, dim circle for queued. Optional elapsed timer.
closed_reason: Per-tool status icons (circle/spinner/check/X) with CSS classes for color. Elapsed timer with rotating spinner frames via set_interval(1, _tick_elapsed). Status labels shown inline per row.

title: Add error recovery with per-tool retry
description: On failure: mark tool as failed, continue queue to next tool, show per-tool Retry button after queue completes.
closed_reason: Failed tools marked FAILED status, queue continues to next. Install All Missing button re-enables after queue and includes failed tools. Re-check button also available. Summary message after queue shows done/failed counts.

title: Make log panel always visible and delimit per-tool output
description: Remove display:none from RichLog CSS. Write clear header before each tool's install output. Show placeholder text when no installs running.
closed_reason: Log panel always visible (no display:none). Placeholder message on mount. Each install delimited with cyan header line and command echo. Raw subprocess output written via Text() to avoid markup injection.
